headline: SCVL Q4 Earnings & Sales Meet Estimates, Stock Down 8%, Comps Dip Y/Y
summary: Shoe Carnival stock slides after Q4 as falling sales, weak comps and a cautious 2026 outlook overshadow steady progress in its Shoe Station expansion.

headline: Ross Stores Shows Broad-Based Category Strength: Can Momentum Hold?
summary: ROST posts broad-based category strength with strong Q4 gains and record sales, but sustaining balanced momentum remains the key test ahead.
